name: concept-workspace
description: Share durable team context in Concept Workspace and use Concept Workspace connector tools from local agents.

interface.shortDescription: Publish team playbooks and use Concept Workspace connector tools.
interface.longDescription: Use Concept Workspace as the shared workspace for local Codex, Claude Code, and other agent sessions. Publish durable playbooks, notes, prompts, and session summaries, then discover and call Concept Workspace-brokered connector tools without exposing credentials locally.
defaultPrompt: Publish this workflow to Concept Workspace.
Find connector tools for this task.
